title: Mosiera ophiticola
taxonomy: Mosiera ophiticola is a species of flowering plant in the family Myrtaceae. It is native to Cuba. The classification of Mosiera ophiticola places it in the genus Mosiera and the order Myrtales. Further classification within the kingdom of Plantae, it is a dicotyledonous angiosperm. It is also known to be a member of the clade Angiosperms and the clade Eudicotyledons.
